Skip to contents
eepR 0.6.0
  • Reference

model

Source: R/model.R
model.Rd

model

Usage

model(x, y, pkg, fun, args = NULL, id = NULL)

Arguments

x

features/predictors passed to the modeling function

y

outcome passed to the modeling function

pkg

package name that contains the modeling function

fun

modeling function name

args

named list of additional arguments passed to the modeling function

id

optional column name or index to drop from both x and y

Value

Fitted model returned by the requested modeling function.

Examples

x <- iris[, c("Sepal.Length", "Sepal.Width", "Petal.Length", "Petal.Width")]
y <- iris["Species"]
model(x, y, pkg = "e1071", fun = "svm", args = list(kernel = "linear"))
#> Error in svm.default(kernel = "linear", x = structure(list(Sepal.Length = c(5.1, 4.9, 4.7, 4.6, 5, 5.4, 4.6, 5, 4.4, 4.9, 5.4, 4.8, 4.8, 4.3, 5.8, 5.7, 5.4, 5.1, 5.7, 5.1, 5.4, 5.1, 4.6, 5.1, 4.8, "virginica"), class = "factor")), row.names = c(NA, -150L), class = "data.frame")): Need numeric dependent variable for regression.
